metadata.text_type: Tao Te Ching, I Ching, Analects

texts.text_name_en: Tao Te Ching (Classic of the Way and Virtue)
texts.author: Laozi (老子)

verses.pinyin: Dào kě dào, fēi cháng dào
verses.translation_en: The Tao that can be told is not the eternal Tao

verses.pinyin: Míng kě míng, fēi cháng míng
verses.translation_en: The name that can be named is not the eternal name

verses.text_zh: 天下皆知美之為美，斯惡已
verses.pinyin: Tiānxià jiē zhī měi zhī wéi měi, sī è yǐ
verses.translation_en: When everyone knows beauty as beauty, there is already ugliness

verses.pinyin: Shàng shàn ruò shuǐ
verses.translation_en: The highest good is like water

verses.pinyin: Shuǐ shàn lì wàn wù ér bù zhēng
verses.translation_en: Water benefits all things without contention

verses.pinyin: Yǒu wù hùn chéng, xiān tiāndì shēng
verses.translation_en: There was something undifferentiated and yet complete, born before heaven and earth

verses.text_zh: 寂兮寥兮，獨立而不改，周行而不殆
verses.pinyin: Jì xī liáo xī, dú lì ér bù gǎi, zhōu xíng ér bù dài
verses.translation_en: Silent and void, it stands alone and does not change, goes around without peril

verses.pinyin: Kě yǐ wéi tiānxià mǔ
verses.translation_en: It can be considered the mother of the universe

verses.pinyin: Wú bù zhī qí míng, zì zhī yuē dào
verses.translation_en: I do not know its name; I call it Tao

verses.pinyin: Fǎn zhě dào zhī dòng
verses.translation_en: Reversion is the movement of the Tao

verses.pinyin: Ruò zhě dào zhī yòng
verses.translation_en: Weakness is the function of the Tao

verses.text_zh: 道生一，一生二，二生三，三生萬物
verses.pinyin: Dào shēng yī, yī shēng èr, èr shēng sān, sān shēng wàn wù
verses.translation_en: The Tao produced One; One produced Two; Two produced Three; Three produced all things

verses.pinyin: Wéi wú wéi, shì wú shì, wèi wú wèi
verses.translation_en: Practice non-action, work without doing, taste the tasteless

verses.pinyin: Wǒ yǒu sān bǎo, chí ér bǎo zhī
verses.translation_en: I have three treasures; hold and keep them

verses.text_zh: 一曰慈，二曰儉，三曰不敢為天下先
verses.pinyin: Yī yuē cí, èr yuē jiǎn, sān yuē bù gǎn wéi tiānxià xiān
verses.translation_en: First is compassion, second is frugality, third is not daring to be first in the world

hexagrams.pinyin: Yuán hēng, lì pìn mǎ zhī zhēn
hexagrams.translation_en: Supreme success, perseverance of a mare brings good fortune

hexagrams.pinyin: Xiǎo wǎng dà lái, jí hēng
hexagrams.translation_en: The small departs, the great arrives. Good fortune, success

hexagrams.pinyin: Pǐ zhī fěi rén, bù lì jūn zǐ zhēn
hexagrams.translation_en: Standstill. It does not further the perseverance of the superior person

verses.pinyin: Xué ér shí xí zhī, bù yì yuè hū
verses.translation_en: Is it not pleasant to learn and practice what one has learned?

verses.text_zh: 有朋自遠方來，不亦樂乎
verses.pinyin: Yǒu péng zì yuǎn fāng lái, bù yì lè hū
verses.translation_en: Is it not delightful to have friends coming from distant quarters?

verses.pinyin: Wú shí yǒu wǔ ér zhì yú xué
verses.translation_en: At fifteen, I set my heart upon learning

verses.text_zh: 知之為知之，不知為不知，是知也
verses.pinyin: Zhī zhī wéi zhī zhī, bù zhī wéi bù zhī, shì zhī yě
verses.translation_en: To know what you know and what you do not know, that is true knowledge

verses.text_zh: 曾子曰，夫子之道，忠恕而已矣
verses.pinyin: Zēng zǐ yuē, fū zǐ zhī dào, zhōng shù ér yǐ yǐ
verses.translation_en: The Master's way is nothing but loyalty and reciprocity

verses.pinyin: Jǐ suǒ bù yù, wù shī yú rén
verses.translation_en: Do not impose on others what you yourself do not desire

verses.text_zh: 其恕乎，己所不欲，勿施於人
verses.pinyin: Qí shù hū, jǐ suǒ bù yù, wù shī yú rén
verses.translation_en: Is not reciprocity the word? What you do not want done to yourself, do not do to others

verses.text_zh: 大學之道，在明明德，在親民，在止於至善
verses.pinyin: Dà xué zhī dào, zài míng míng dé, zài qīn mín, zài zhǐ yú zhì shàn
verses.translation_en: The way of great learning consists in manifesting one's clear virtue, loving the people, and abiding in the highest good

verses.text_zh: 天命之謂性，率性之謂道，修道之謂教
verses.pinyin: Tiān mìng zhī wèi xìng, lǜ xìng zhī wèi dào, xiū dào zhī wèi jiào
verses.translation_en: What heaven imparts to man is called nature. To follow nature is called the Way. To cultivate the Way is called education
